name: LiveCaption
tagline: Real-time transcription with speaker diarization for the deaf
description: Live speech-to-text captions displayed on your G2 glasses with speaker identification. Powered by Deepgram Nova-3.
author: Tim Heideman

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: Capture audio from the glasses microphone for live transcription.

permissions.name: phone-microphone
permissions.desc: Capture audio from the phone microphone for voiceprint enrollment when adding a new contact.

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Stream audio to the transcription server and receive captions.
